overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's urban streets. The player moves from under a highway overpass, crosses a busy intersection with futuristic vehicles, and continues through a covered pedestrian walkway lined with neon-lit storefronts and digital billboards.

events.description: approaching crosswalk with red traffic light displayed on signal

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the highway overpass toward the intersection

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing beside a display rack of magazines or postcards

entered.detail: massive concrete elevated highway with support pillars creating a covered corridor
large digital billboard mounted on the ceiling of the overpass displaying advertisements
wooden rack displaying magazines or postcards with a green trash bin beside it
vertical traffic signal pole showing red light
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the road ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive highway overpass with digital advertising screens on the ceiling. A street vendor stands beside a display rack on the left while the camera approaches a crosswalk with a red traffic signal ahead.

events.description: purple sports car and green vintage car drive through the intersection
beginning to cross the street from the left side to the right sidewalk

agents.ego_description: waiting at the crosswalk then crossing the street while futuristic vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: purple sports car with white stripes driving through the intersection
dark green retro-futuristic car with white wall tires driving through the intersection

entered.detail: white metal railing separating the pedestrian walkway from the road
large digital billboard on building facade displaying 'BARGHEST' advertisement with a portrait
patterned asphalt with yellow stripes and red 'WAIT' text markings

segments.scene_description: At the urban intersection crossing the street while a purple sports car and green vintage vehicle drive past. The camera moves across the patterned crosswalk surface toward a white traffic barrier on the right, passing the large digital billboard on the left building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian shopping walkway with glass canopy

events.description: entering the covered glass walkway after crossing the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pedestrian pathway passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in bright neon green shorts and gray top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: arched transparent glass and metal roof structure covering the pedestrian walkway
row of shops with colorful facades and digital displays lining the left side
large vertical screens displaying various advertisements on the building walls
transparent glass wall separating the walkway from the street with parked cars visible beyond

segments.scene_description: Entering a covered pedestrian walkway with a curved glass and metal canopy overhead. Commercial storefronts with digital advertisement panels line the left side while a glass wall on the right reveals parked cars on the street. A pedestrian in bright neon clothing walks toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor with vending machines

events.description: lighting shifts to more prominent neon colors with pink and yellow signage becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing through the covered walkway passing under colorful neon signage and vending machines

notable_agents.action: child in striped shirt walking ahead on the right side of the walkway

entered.detail: large pink neon sign reading 'WATSON WHORE' hanging over the walkway entrance
bright green and red automated vending machines with neon lighting and 'BURRITO' labeling
yellow billboard with cartoon chef character advertising 'ALL FOODS'
digital advertisement screen for 'EL GUAPO' with neon green text and imagery

segments.scene_description: Deeper into the commercial walkway where the lighting becomes dominated by vibrant neon signs. A large pink 'WATSON WHORE' sign hangs overhead while colorful vending machines and an 'ALL FOODS' banner line the path. The glass canopy continues overhead as the camera passes various storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the concrete shadows of a highway overpass into a vibrant, neon-drenched commercial corridor. It begins beneath a massive overpass adorned with ceiling-mounted digital screens, passing a street vendor before approaching a red traffic signal at a crosswalk. As the camera crosses the intersection, purple and green vehicles streak past while the view shifts from the patterned pavement toward a large digital billboard on a nearby building. The scene then transitions into a covered pedestrian walkway under a curved glass and metal canopy, where the camera passes a neon-clad pedestrian and storefronts lined with digital panels. Finally, the environment becomes fully immersed in saturated light as the camera moves deeper into the walkway, passing colorful vending machines and a prominent pink neon sign under the continuing glass roof.
